name: Webster Financial Corporation Depositary Shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of 6.50% Series G non-cumulative perpetual preferred stock
summary: Webster Financial Corporation Depositary Shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of 6.50% Series G non-cumulative perpetual preferred stock represents fractional ownership in preferred stock issued by Webster Financial Corporation. The depositary shares offer a fixed dividend rate and rank senior to common stock in liquidation. The nature of the company is a financial institution.
